# ishosting_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an ISHosting SSH key.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `public_key` (String) SSH public key content.
- `title` (String) SSH key title/name.

### Read-Only

- `fingerprint` (String) SSH key fingerprint.
- `id` (String) SSH key ID.
